obj.GetOverflowBucketofIndex(0).to_ullong());\n\n  obj.AddElem(-1);\n\n  obj.ComputeCardinality();\n  ans = obj.GetCardinality();\n\n  ASSERT_EQ(ans, 227086569448168320);\n  auto expected4 = ASSERT_EQ(obj.GetDenseBucket()[0].to_ullong(), 0);\n  ASSERT_EQ(obj.GetOverflowBucketofIndex(0).to_ullong(), 4);\n}\n\nTEST(HyperLogLogTest, DISABLED_PrestoEdgeCase) {\n  auto obj = <string>\n\n#include \"common/macros.h\"\n#include \"type/value.h\"\n\nnamespace bustub {\n\nusing hash_t = std::size_t;\n\nclass HashUtil {\n private:\n  static const hash_t PRIME_FACTOR = 10000019;\n\n public:\n  static inline auto HashBytes(const char *bytes, size_t length) -> hash_t {\n    // https://github.com/greenplum-db/gpos/blob/b53c1acd6285de94044ff91fbee91589543feba1/libgpos/src/utils.cpp#L126\n    hash_t hash = length;\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < length; ++i) {\n      hash = ((hash << 5) ^ (hash >> 27)) ^ bytes[i];\n    }\n    return hash;\n  }\n\n  static inline auto CombineHashes(hash_t l, hash_t r) -> hash_t {\n    hash_t both[2] = {};\n    both[0] = l;\n    both[1] = r;\n    return HashBytes(reinterpret_cast<char *>(both), sizeof(hash_t) * 2);\n  }\n\n  static inline auto SumHashes(hash_t l, hash_t r) -> hash_t {\n    return (l % PRIME_FACTOR + r % PRIME_FACTOR) % PRIME_FACTOR;\n  }\n\n  template <typename T>\n  static inline auto Hash(const T *ptr) -> hash_t {\n    return HashBytes(reinterpret_cast<const char *>(ptr), sizeof(T));\n  }\n\n  template <typename T>\n  static inline auto HashPtr(const T *ptr) -> hash_t {\n    return HashBytes(reinterpret_cast<const char *>(&ptr), sizeof(void *));\n  }\n\n  /** @return the hash of the value */\n  static inline auto HashValue(const Value *val) -> hash_t {\n    switch (val->GetTypeId()) {\n      case TypeId::TINYINT: {\n        auto raw = static_cast<int64_t>(val->GetAs<int8_t>());\n        return Hash<int64_t>(&raw);\n      }\n      case TypeId::SMALLINT: {\n        auto raw = static_cast<int64_t>(val->GetAs<int16_t>());\n        return Hash<int64_t>(&raw);\n      }\n      case TypeId::INTEGER: {\n        auto raw = static_cast<int64_t>(val->GetAs<int32_t>());\n        return Hash<int64_t>(&raw);\n      }\n      case TypeId::BIGINT: {\n        auto raw = static_cast<int64_t>(val->GetAs<int64_t>());\n        return Hash<int64_t>(&raw);\n      }\n      case TypeId::BOOLEAN: {\n        auto raw = val->GetAs<bool>();\n        return Hash<bool>(&raw);\n      }\n      case TypeId::DECIMAL: {\n        auto raw = val->GetAs<double>();\n        return Hash<double>(&raw);\n      }\n      case TypeId::VARCHAR: {\n        auto raw = val->GetData();\n        auto len = val->GetStorageSize();\n        return HashBytes(raw, len);\n      }\n      case TypeId::TIMESTAMP: {\n        auto raw = val->GetAs<uint64_t>();\n        return Hash<uint64_t>(&raw);\n }\n\n  /** @brief Returns overflow bucket of a specific given index. */\n  auto GetOverflowBucketofIndex(uint16_t idx) { return overflow_bucket_[idx]; }\n\n  /** @brief Retusn the cardinality of the set. */\n  auto GetCardinality() const -> uint64_t { return cardinality_; }\n\n  /** @brief Element is added for HLL calculation. */\n  auto AddElem(KeyType val) -> void;\n\n  /** @brief Function to compute cardinality. */\n  auto ComputeCardinality() -> void;\n\n private:\n  /** @brief Calculate Hash.\n   *\n   * @param[in] val\n   *\n   * @returns hash value\n   */\n  inline auto CalculateHash(KeyType val) -> hash_t {\n    Value val_obj;\n    if constexpr (std::is_same<KeyType, std::string>::value) {\n      val_obj = Value(VARCHAR, val);\n      return bustub::HashUtil::HashValue(&val_obj);\n    }\n    if constexpr (std::is_same<KeyType, int64_t>::value) {\n      return static_cast<hash_t>(val);\n    }\n    return 0;\n  }\n\n  /** @brief Structure holding dense buckets (or also known as registers). */\n  std::vector<std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>> dense_bucket_;\n\n  /** @brief Structure holding overflow buckets. */\n  std::unordered_map<uint16_t, std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>> overflow_bucket_;\n\n  /** @brief Storing cardinality value */\n  uint64_t cardinality_;\n\n  // TODO(student) - can add more data structures as required\n};\n\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":82,"oldLines":6,"newStart":82,"newLines":12,"lines":["   /** @brief Storing cardinality value */","   uint64_t cardinality_;"," ","+  /** @brief Number of leading bits for bucketing */","+  int16_t n_leading_bits_;","+","+  /** @brief Mutex for thread safety */","+  mutable std::mutex mutex_;","+","   // TODO(student) - can add more data structures as required"," };"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

 // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(num_buckets, std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>());\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_leading_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (1-indexed from the right)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + 1;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Split position into dense (4 bits) and overflow (3 bits)\n  uint8_t dense_val = rho & 0xF;        // Lower 4 bits\n  uint8_t overflow_val = (rho >> 4) & 0x7;  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(num_buckets, std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>());\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_leading_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (1-indexed from the right)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + 1;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Split position into dense (4 bits) and overflow (3 bits)\n  uint8_t dense_val = rho & 0xF;        // Lower 4 bits\n  uint8_t overflow_val = (rho >> 4) & 0x7;  // Upper 3 bits\n\n  {\n    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n    if (j < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n      // Update dense bucket with max\n      uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n      if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n        current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      }\n\n      uint16_t current_val = (current_overflow << 4) | current_dense;\n      uint16_t new_val = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n\n      if (new_val > current_val) {\n        dense_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n        overflow_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // HyperLogLog formula: E = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n  size_t m = dense_bucket_.size();\n  double alpha = CONSTANT;  // 0.79402\n\n  double sum = 0.0;\n  for (size_t j = 0; j < m; ++j) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    }\n    uint16_t rho = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n    sum += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;\n\n  // Round to nearest integer\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(raw_estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":28,"oldLines":11,"newStart":28,"newLines":11,"lines":["   // Get remaining bits","   hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;"," ","-  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (1-indexed from the right)","+  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right)","   uint64_t rho = 0;","   for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_;  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(num_buckets, std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>());\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_leading_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_;  // Extract first n_bits\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_bits_;\n\n  // Convert to bitset and find leftmost 1\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> bset = ComputeBinary(w);\n  uint64_t rho = PositionOfLeftmostOne(bset);\n  if (rho > 0) {\n    rho += n_bits_;  // 0.79402\n\n  double sum = 0.0;\n  for (uint8_t val : m_) {\n    sum += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(val));\n  }\n\n  double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;\n\n  // Round to nearest integer\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<size_t>(raw_estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<std::string>;\n\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":49,"oldLines":9,"newStart":49,"newLines":8,"lines":["   // Convert to bitset and find leftmost 1","   std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> bset = ComputeBinary(w);","   uint64_t rho = PositionOfLeftmostOne(bset);","-  if (rho > 0) {","-    rho += n_bits_;  // Default to max if all zeros\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // +1 for the leading zeros count\n      break;\n    }\n  }","newString":"  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right, relative to original hash)\n  uint64_t rho = 64;  // Default to max if all zeros\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + n_leading_bits_;\n      break;\n    }\n  }","originalFile":"#include \"primer/hyperloglog_presto.h\"\n\n#include <cmath>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nnamespace bustub {\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nHyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::HyperLogLogPresto(int16_t n_leading_bits)\n    : cardinality_(0), n_leading_bits_(n_leading_bits) {\n  if (n_leading_bits >= 0) {\n    size_t num_buckets = 1ULL << n_leading_bits;  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(num_buckets, std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>());\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_leading_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right, relative to original hash)\n  // Count leading zeros + 1 in the remaining bits\n  uint64_t rho = 64;  // Default to max if all zeros\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // +1 for the leading zeros count\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Split position into dense (4 bits) and overflow (3 bits)\n  uint8_t dense_val = rho & 0xF;        // Lower 4 bits\n  uint8_t overflow_val = (rho >> 4) & 0x7;  // Upper 3 bits\n\n  {\n    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n    if (j < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n      // Update dense bucket with max\n      uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n      if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n        current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      }\n\n      uint16_t current_val = (current_overflow << 4) | current_dense;\n      uint16_t new_val = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n\n      if (new_val > current_val) {\n        dense_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n        overflow_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // HyperLogLog formula: E = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n  size_t m = dense_bucket_.size();\n  double alpha = CONSTANT;  // Default to max of remaining bits if all zeros\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + n_leading_bits_;\n      break;\n    }\n  }","originalFile":"#include \"primer/hyperloglog_presto.h\"\n\n#include <cmath>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nnamespace bustub {\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nHyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::HyperLogLogPresto(int16_t n_leading_bits)\n    : cardinality_(0), n_leading_bits_(n_leading_bits) {\n  if (n_leading_bits >= 0) {\n    size_t num_buckets = 1ULL << n_leading_bits;  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(num_buckets, std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>());\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_leading_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right, relative to original hash)\n  uint64_t rho = 64;  // Default to max if all zeros\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + n_leading_bits_;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Split position into dense (4 bits) and overflow (3 bits)\n  uint8_t dense_val = rho & 0xF;        // Lower 4 bits\n  uint8_t overflow_val = (rho >> 4) & 0x7;  // Upper 3 bits\n\n  {\n    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n    if (j < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n      // Update dense bucket with max\n      uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n      if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n        current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      }\n\n      uint16_t current_val = (current_overflow << 4) | current_dense;\n      uint16_t new_val = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n\n      if (new_val > current_val) {\n        dense_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n        overflow_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // HyperLogLog formula: E = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n  size_t m = dense_bucket_.size();\n  double alpha = CONSTANT;  // 0.79402\n\n  double sum = 0.0;\n  for (size_t j = 0; j < m; ++j) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    }\n    uint16_t rho = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n    sum += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;\n\n  // Round to nearest integer\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(raw_estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":29,"oldLines":7,"newStart":29,"newLines":8,"lines":["   hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;"," ","   // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right, relative to original hash)","-  uint64_t rho = 64; i >= 0; --i) {","     if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {","       rho = i + n_leading_bits_;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

i >= 0; --i) {\n    if (bset[i]) {\n      return (BITSET_CAPACITY - 1 - i);\n    }\n  }\n  return BITSET_CAPACITY;\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ < 0 || m_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_bits_) - 1);  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(num_buckets, std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>());\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_leading_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right, relative to original hash)\n  // If all zeros, return 64 - n_leading_bits (max position in the remaining bits)\n  uint64_t rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_;  // Default to max of remaining bits if all zeros\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + n_leading_bits_;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Split position into dense (4 bits) and overflow (3 bits)\n  uint8_t dense_val = rho & 0xF;        // Lower 4 bits\n  uint8_t overflow_val = (rho >> 4) & 0x7;  // Upper 3 bits\n\n  {\n    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n    if (j < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n      // Update dense bucket with max\n      uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n      if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n        current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      }\n\n      uint16_t current_val = (current_overflow << 4) | current_dense;\n      uint16_t new_val = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n\n      if (new_val > current_val) {\n        dense_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n        overflow_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // HyperLogLog formula: E = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n  size_t m = dense_bucket_.size();\n  double alpha = CONSTANT;  // 0.79402\n\n  double sum = 0.0;\n  for (size_t j = 0; j < m; ++j) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    }\n    uint16_t rho = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n    sum += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;\n\n  // Round to nearest integer\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(raw_estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":88,"oldLines":8,"newStart":88,"newLines":8,"lines":[" ","   double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;"," ","-  // Round to nearest integer","-  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(raw_estimate + 0.5);","+  // Truncate to integer (floor)","+  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(raw_estimate);"," }"," "," template class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

 // 2^n_bits\n  m_.assign(num_buckets, 0);\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeBinary(const hash_t &hash) const -> std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> {\n  return std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY>(hash);\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::PositionOfLeftmostOne(const std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> &bset) const -> uint64_t {\n  // Find the position of the leftmost 1 bit\n  // Returns the leading zeros count (0-indexed bit position)\n  for (int i = BITSET_CAPACITY - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if (bset[i]) {\n      return (BITSET_CAPACITY - 1 - i);\n    }\n  }\n  return BITSET_CAPACITY;  // All zeros - return max position\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ < 0 || m_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_bits_) - 1);  // Extract first n_bits\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_bits_;\n\n  // Convert to bitset and find leftmost 1\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> bset = ComputeBinary(w);\n  uint64_t rho = PositionOfLeftmostOne(bset);\n  // Add n_bits to account for the bits used for bucket index\n  rho += n_bits_;\n\n  // Store max value\n  {\n    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n    if (j < m_.size()) {\n      m_[j] = std::max(m_[j], static_cast<uint8_t>(rho));\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ < 0 || m_.empty()) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // HyperLogLog formula: E = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n  size_t m = m_.size();\n  double alpha = CONSTANT;  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(num_buckets, std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>());\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_leading_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right, relative to original hash)\n  // If all zeros, return 64 - n_leading_bits (max position in the remaining bits)\n  uint64_t rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_;  // Default to max of remaining bits if all zeros\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + n_leading_bits_;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Split position into dense (4 bits) and overflow (3 bits)\n  uint8_t dense_val = rho & 0xF;        // Lower 4 bits\n  uint8_t overflow_val = (rho >> 4) & 0x7;  // Upper 3 bits\n\n  {\n    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n    if (j < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n      // Update dense bucket with max\n      uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n      if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n        current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      }\n\n      uint16_t current_val = (current_overflow << 4) | current_dense;\n      uint16_t new_val = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n\n      if (new_val > current_val) {\n        dense_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n        overflow_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // HyperLogLog formula: E = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n  size_t m = dense_bucket_.size();\n  double alpha = CONSTANT;  // 0.79402\n\n  double sum = 0.0;\n  for (size_t j = 0; j < m; ++j) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    }\n    uint16_t rho = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n    sum += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;\n\n  // Truncate to integer (floor)\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(raw_estimate);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":88,"oldLines":8,"newStart":88,"newLines":8,"lines":[" ","   double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;"," ","-  // Truncate to integer (floor)","-  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(raw_estimate);","+  // Round to nearest integer (standard rounding)","+  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(std::round(raw_estimate));"," }"," "," template class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5ca6dd04-fcc6-4aca-bfb6-1e7bc9bde5e7","uuid":"48281dbd-8fab-4ef8-87be-4a3d650fa809","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/workspace/bustub/src/primer/hyperloglog.cpp","content":"#include \"primer/hyperloglog.h\"\n\n#include <cmath>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nnamespace bustub {\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nHyperLogLog<KeyType>::HyperLogLog(int16_t n_bits) : cardinality_(0), n_bits_(n_bits) {\n  if (n_bits < 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n  size_t num_buckets = 1ULL << n_bits;  // 2^n_bits\n  m_.assign(num_buckets, 0);\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeBinary(const hash_t &hash) const -> std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> {\n  return std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY>(hash);\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::PositionOfLeftmostOne(const std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> &bset) const -> uint64_t {\n  // Find the position of the leftmost 1 bit\n  // Returns the leading zeros count (0-indexed bit position)\n  for (int i = BITSET_CAPACITY - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if (bset[i]) {\n      return (BITSET_CAPACITY - 1 - i);\n    }\n  }\n  return BITSET_CAPACITY;  // All zeros - return max position\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ < 0 || m_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_bits_) - 1);  // Extract first n_bits\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_bits_;\n\n  // Convert to bitset and find leftmost 1\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> bset = ComputeBinary(w);\n  uint64_t rho = PositionOfLeftmostOne(bset);\n  // Add n_bits to account for the bits used for bucket index\n  rho += n_bits_;\n\n  // Store max value\n  {\n    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n    if (j < m_.size()) {\n      m_[j] = std::max(m_[j], static_cast<uint8_t>(rho));\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ < 0 || m_.empty()) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // HyperLogLog formula: E = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n  size_t m = m_.size();\n  double alpha = CONSTANT;  // 0.79402\n\n  double sum = 0.0;\n  for (uint8_t val : m_) {\n    sum += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(val));\n  }\n\n  double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;\n\n  // Round to nearest integer (standard rounding)\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<size_t>(std::round(raw_estimate));\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<std::string>;\n\n}  // namespace bustub\n","numLines":89,"startLine":1,"totalLines":89}}}

 // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(num_buckets, std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>());\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from first n_leading_bits bits\n  size_t j = hash & ((1ULL << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits\n  hash_t w = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Find position of leftmost 1 bit (0-indexed from the right, relative to original hash)\n  // If all zeros, return 64 - n_leading_bits (max position in the remaining bits)\n  uint64_t rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_;  // Default to max of remaining bits if all zeros\n  for (int i = 63 - n_leading_bits_; i >= 0; --i) {\n    if ((w & (1ULL << i)) != 0) {\n      rho = i + n_leading_bits_;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Split position into dense (4 bits) and overflow (3 bits)\n  uint8_t dense_val = rho & 0xF;        // Lower 4 bits\n  uint8_t overflow_val = (rho >> 4) & 0x7;  // Upper 3 bits\n\n  {\n    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n    if (j < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n      // Update dense bucket with max\n      uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n      if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n        current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n      }\n\n      uint16_t current_val = (current_overflow << 4) | current_dense;\n      uint16_t new_val = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n\n      if (new_val > current_val) {\n        dense_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n        overflow_bucket_[j] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0 || dense_bucket_.empty()) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // HyperLogLog formula: E = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n  size_t m = dense_bucket_.size();\n  double alpha = CONSTANT;  // 0.79402\n\n  double sum = 0.0;\n  for (size_t j = 0; j < m; ++j) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.count(j) > 0) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[j].to_ulong();\n    }\n    uint16_t rho = (overflow_val << 4) | dense_val;\n    sum += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double raw_estimate = alpha * m * m / sum;\n\n  // Round to nearest integer (standard rounding)\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(std::round(raw_estimate));\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","numLines":98,"startLine":1,"totalLines":98}}}
